hebrew: ק״ל — שת, דור שני ליצירה, נולד בשנת ק״ל, ק״ל לחיי אדם.
english: AM 130 — Seth, the second generation from Creation, was born in the year 130, in the 130th year of Adam's life.
notes: Formulaic genealogical entry; Hebrew restored from OCR of Warsaw 1878 p.7 with standard Tzemach David / Genesis chronology. Independent English machine translation.
